label: ML Pipeline
description: Training status, model families, feature freshness, and accuracy metrics for the sports ML pipeline.

0.5.note: No mock imports — modelFamilies and featureFreshness sourced from SportsDataProvider (context-local constants).

0.6.note: Loading guard via Spinner on wsStatus=connecting.

0.7.note: Empty guard: modelFamilies.length===0 renders 'No ML pipeline data available'.

0.8.note: Error guard via destructive msg on wsStatus=error|disconnected.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.6/0.8 added in prior pass.

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData() — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: Org filter wired via hasSportsDesk memo.

1.7.note: MOCK_MODEL_FAMILIES and MOCK_FEATURE_FRESHNESS are context-local constants (not exported from lib/mocks).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (real-time model status), paper ✓ (same view), batch ✓ (historical model audit). Read-only status dashboard in all modes.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); mode propagated. No mode-specific ML status behavior needed.

3.5.note: Paper mode: ML status displays normally — no trade actions.

3.6.note: timeSince() helper computes elapsed time on render — no interval or WebSocket in widget.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons — read-only status dashboard.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending: verify scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target strategies: sports-betting, sports-arb. ML pipeline status informs confidence in model predictions — operational awareness for traders relying on ML-generated signals.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human walkthrough pending.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests not yet written for sports domain.

7.1.note: FIXED: zinc-200/300/500/600/800/900 color classes replaced with design tokens. Status colors now use CSS var tokens (--status-live, --status-warning, --status-critical, --status-running). Backgrounds use bg-card/40, bg-muted/60, border-border.

7.2.note: No mock imports in widget — model data from context.

7.3.note: 139 lines → reduced to ~136 after refactor — within limit.

7.4.note: Component PascalCase, file kebab-case. statusColors/stalenessColors are module-level stable maps.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useMemo/useEffect in widget. timeSince() is a pure function called in render — acceptable.

l7.notes: 7.1 fixed in this pass. 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: FIXED: text-xs downgraded to text-micro (10px) for primary labels and text-nano (9px) for secondary meta (counts, time-since) at lines 65,75,79,85,89,95,101,103,109,110,118,125,126,129,132. Tokens defined in app/globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Uses Spinner shared primitive. Model cards use native div rows — appropriate for status dashboards (not form/table widgets).

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no interactive div without role — all elements are read-only displays. Human: keyboard walk pending.

8.5.note: Human-only: resize test at minW=4/minH=4 pending.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed — text-micro/text-nano tokens applied for dense dashboard labels. 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.4-8.5 human pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Operational monitoring widget — distinct from prediction display (sports-predictions). They serve different audiences: ML engineer vs. trader.

relationships.notes: ModelFamily and FeatureFreshness types defined in sports-data-context.tsx. No coupling to other sports widgets.

dataContract.notes: ML pipeline status updates every minute or on training completion. REST polling appropriate. Production: dedicated ML monitoring service endpoint.

gaps: Model training trigger not exposed in widget
No alerting when model goes stale or failed
coverage.notes: Read-only operational dashboard for the sports ML pipeline.

knownIssues: MOCK_MODEL_FAMILIES and MOCK_FEATURE_FRESHNESS are context-local constants in SportsDataProvider — promote to API when real ML monitoring endpoint available

findings.description: sports-ml-status-widget.tsx — loading/error guards were missing in prior state
findings.fix: wsStatus-based Spinner (connecting) and error message (error|disconnected) added

findings.description: sports-ml-status-widget.tsx — zinc-200/300/500/600/800/900 hardcoded color classes throughout
findings.fix: Replaced with design tokens: text-foreground, text-foreground/80, text-muted-foreground, text-muted-foreground/60, border-border, bg-card/40, bg-muted/60; status colors use CSS var tokens

findings.description: sports-ml-status-widget.tsx:65,75,79,85,89,95,101,108,116,123,124,127,130 — text-[10px], text-[9px] for compact dashboard labels
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px) to KPI captions, section headers and primary model/feature labels; applied text-nano (9px) to secondary meta (family count, targets list, time-since, column count). text-xs workarounds removed across the dense dashboard rows.
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: sports-ml-status-widget.tsx — statusColors map used hardcoded Tailwind palette (bg-emerald-500, bg-amber-500, bg-blue-500, bg-red-500) for model family status indicators
findings.fix: Replaced palette colors with semantic CSS var tokens: healthy→bg-[var(--status-live)], stale→bg-[var(--status-warning)], training→bg-[var(--status-running)] animate-pulse, failed→bg-[var(--status-critical)]. Matches design-system status semantics used across other domains.
